arts.ttl: Chelsea end Liverpool's transfer hopes: Colwill loving life under Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea seemingly have no reason to worry about Liverpool's interest in Levi Colwill as the player is loving life under Enzo Maresca, according to a report. However, when Maresca came in, he assured Colwill that he would be the starter on the left side of a centre-back pairing, which put the 21-year-old's mind at ease over his Chelsea future, according to Jacobs.

arts.ttl: Liverpool send 'prayers' after fan dies in Milan
arts.sum: A Liverpool fan who traveled to Italy to watch the Champions League game against AC Milan has died following a road traffic accident, the Premier League club said Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Why Divock Origi isn't involved against Liverpool - AC Milan spat explained
arts.sum: Belgium international striker Divock Origi left Liverpool for AC Milan in 2022 but isn't part of the squad as the Rossoneri take on his former side in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Ibrahimovic asserts authority at AC Milan: “I’m the boss”
arts.sum: Zlatan Ibrahimovic, Senior Advisor to RedBird Capital for AC Milan, spoke to Sky Sport before the club’s Champions League opener against Liverpool at San Siro. The Swedish legend addressed various topics, including his role at the club and recent absences, with his characteristic directness. On the importance of the match, Ibrahimovic stated, “It’s an important week, with the first game today against Liverpool. It comes at a good, right moment for the team. We certainly didn’t have the start we wanted, but with the right patience, you’ll see we’ll get there.
